categories.name: High-Performance Viral Hooks
categories.description: Consistently stop the scroll by triggering curiosity and promising immediate value.
formulas: Nobody is talking about THIS...
You’re doing [something] wrong – here’s why
3 secrets [industry] pros don’t want you to know
This will save you HOURS...
Here’s the fastest way to [desirable outcome]
categories.why_it_works: They trigger curiosity, leverage FOMO, and promise quick, concrete value.

categories.name: The Problem-Solution Hook
categories.description: Identify a pain point, then promise a solution.
formulas: If you're struggling to [problem], here's what you're doing wrong...
Still getting [negative result]? These [number] changes will fix that...
Your [thing] isn't [result] because you're missing this...
You’re doing [something] wrong – here’s why
categories.why_it_works: Qualifies the audience immediately and promises value.

categories.name: The Number Hook
categories.description: Specific numbers create curiosity and set clear expectations.
formulas: [number] signs you're about to be [outcome] (most people miss #[number])
I tried [number] [category]. Here are the only [number] that worked...
[number] words that will change how people see you...
3 secrets [industry] pros don’t want you to know
categories.why_it_works: Feels concrete and digestible. Promises actionable info.

categories.name: The Contradiction Hook
categories.description: Challenge common beliefs to create cognitive dissonance.
formulas: Everything you know about [topic] is wrong...
The worst [topic] advice that everyone follows...
Why [action] is making you [negative outcome]...
Nobody is talking about THIS...
categories.why_it_works: Forces viewers to question assumptions and stick around for the explanation.

categories.name: The Secret/Insider Hook
formulas: What [type of people] know that you don't...
The [platform/industry] change [authority] doesn't want you to know...
Industry secret: This is how we really [goal]...
3 secrets [industry] pros don’t want you to know
categories.why_it_works: People want to feel like they have exclusive access.

categories.name: The Time-Sensitive Hook
categories.description: Create urgency or reference current events.
formulas: This trend will be dead by [time], but here's how to use it now...
If you don't do this before [year/event] ends...
While everyone's distracted by [event], smart people are doing this...
This will save you HOURS...
categories.why_it_works: Triggers FOMO and compels immediate action.

categories.name: The Personal Story Hook
categories.description: Share a relatable experience or transformation.
formulas: I was [negative state] [time] ago. Here's what changed everything...
My biggest mistake cost me [amount]. Don't make the same one...
The day I realized I was the problem...

categories.name: The Question Hook
categories.description: Ask a question the audience desperately wants answered.
formulas: Want to know the real reason you're not [positive outcome]?
Ever wonder why some people seem naturally [trait]?
Curious how some creators [achievement] overnight?
categories.why_it_works: Creates an open loop in the viewer's mind that demands closure.
